title: FUGUEの実装を確認し、Kernelとの差分を埋めて。ただしFUGUE/kernel両方の既存のシステムを損壊しないように慎重に実装をマルチエージェントで進めて。
summary_text: 1. **High — Kernel handoff can fail hard when `codex-sovereign` is not active, with no fallback path** - `route-task-handoff.sh` unconditionally prefers `kernel-handoff.sh` whenever the script is executable, and only dispatches directly to `fugue-tutti-caller.yml` when the script is missing (`-x` false)【/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh#L577-L607】. - `kernel-handoff.sh` exits non-zero if `config/orchestration/sovereign-adapters.json` does not contain an active `codex-sovereign` entry (`.availability == "active"`)【/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/kernel-handoff.sh#L130-L138】. - Net effect: if adapter state is changed/partial in env, handoff aborts instead of falling back to direct workflow dispatch. 2. **Medium — Local context reference is generated, but attachment is manual-only and hidden from issue comments** - Local flow writes `- kernel context reference:` and a concrete `codex-kernel-guard attach-context ...` command into the local `summary.md`【/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L1135-L1137】. - The same lines are explicitly filtered out of the issue-comment body before posting, so operators do not see the attach instruction on issue comments【/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L1140-L1160】. - No other automatic path invokes `attach-context`; only manual command execution triggers propagation to compact artifact【/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L651-L652】【/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L767-L768】. 3. **Medium — `attach-context` silently tolerates malformed reference JSON fields** - `kind` and `issue_number` are extracted with `jq ... || printf ...`, so malformed/invalid reference JSON can fall back to defaults instead of failing, then still be attached with best-effort metadata【/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L664-L665】. - This can preserve a wrong/empty label derivation without a hard signal of bad input. 4. **Low — Stale context reference can be retained when the source path disappears** - `resolve_context_reference_json` preserves existing `context_reference` when `KERNEL_CONTEXT_REFERENCE_PATH` is set but file is missing, rather than clearing it【/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L366-L369】. - This is already covered as expected in tests【/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L155-L157】, but it is an operational trap if workflows expect path cleanup on file deletion.
